debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
c011 : ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))
⊢ Integrable (fun x => Real.exp (t * x)) (ProbabilityTheory.semicircleReal μ v)

failed_attempts:
exact integrable_dirac _
      · refine integrable_of_ae_eq_on_compl c013 ?_
        filter_upwards with x hx
        simp_all [c012]
    exact c014

intro x hx
          rw [semicirclePDF]
          simp [c012 x hx]
        refine ⟨?_, ae_of_all _ fun x hx ↦ by simpa using this x hx⟩
        refine integrable_congr_ae (ae_of_all _ fun x ↦ ?_) ?_
        · split_ifs with h
          · rfl
          · rw [this x h]
            simp
        · refine integrableOn_congr_set (ae_of_all _ fun x hx ↦ ?_) ?_
          · simp [this x hx]
          · exact (continuous_exp.comp (continuous_id.mul continuous_const)).integrableOn_compact
              (isCompact_Icc)
    exact c015

exact integrable_dirac _
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero _ hv]
        apply integrable_withDensity_of_nonneg_ae
        · exact ae_of_all _ fun _ => by positivity
        · apply (integrableOn_union_iff.2 ⟨c015, c017⟩).mp
          simp
    exact c018

exact integrable_dirac
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero _ hv]
        refine integrable_withDensity_of_restrict _ _
        · exact c015
        · exact ae_of_all _ (fun x hx ↦ by simp [Function.support, semicirclePDF, semicirclePDFReal_def, S] at hx; simp [hx])
    exact c018

exact integrable_dirac _
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv]
        refine integrable_of_ae_restrict _ _
        · exact (integrableOn_univ_iff.mpr c014).restrict
        · filter_upwards
          intro x hx
          simp_all
    exact c015

intro x hx
        calc
          |Real.exp (t * x)| = Real.exp (t * x) := by rw [Real.abs_exp]
          _ ≤ Real.exp (|t * x|) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_abs_self _)
          _ = Real.exp (|t| * |x|) := by rw [abs_mul]
          _ ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
            (by
              have : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
                have hx' : μ - 2 * √v ≤ x ∧ x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := hx
                calc
                  |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := abs_sub_add_abs μ x ▸ (by linarith)
                  _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
                    have : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
                      apply abs_le.mpr
                      constructor
                      · linarith [hx'.1]
                      · linarith [hx'.2]
                    linarith
              exact this)
            (abs_nonneg t))
      by_cases hv : v = 0
      · rw [hv, semicircleReal_zero_var]
        exact integrable_dirac _
      · have h1 : semicircleReal μ v = volume.withDensity (semicirclePDF μ v) :=
          semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero _ hv
        rw [h1]
        refine integrable_withDensity_of_bound_ae (measurable_semicirclePDF _ _) ?_
        filter_upwards with x
        by_cases hxS : x ∈ S
        · exact c011 x hxS
        · have : semicirclePDF μ v x = 0 := by
            rw [← Function.mem_support_iff, support_semicirclePDF hv]
            simp [hxS]
          simp [this]
    exact c01

exact integrable_dirac _
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv]
        refine integrable_of_integrableOn_compl_eq_zero _ (by aesop) c012
        exact c013
    exact c014

_ = Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v)) := rfl
      · exact (isCompact_Icc : IsCompact S).finite_measure
    exact integrableOn_univ_iff.mpr (by
      by_cases hv : v = 0
      · rw [semicircleReal_zero_var μ]
        exact integrable_dirac _
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv]
        refine integrableOn_withDensity_iff.ae_eq_fun (measurable_semicirclePDF μ v) ?_
        apply c013)

calc
              |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := abs_add μ (x - μ) |>.trans (le_add_abs μ (x - μ))
              _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := add_le_add_left (by
                have h₁ : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v) := hxS
                have h₂ : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √↑v := abs_sub_le_iff.mpr ⟨by linarith [h₁.1], by linarith [h₁.2]⟩
                exact h₂) |μ|
          ) (abs_nonneg t))
      · exact (semicircleReal μ v).restrict S
    exact integrable_of_ae_eq_on_compl c013 (ae_of_all _ fun x hx ↦ by simp [c012 x hx])

exact integrable_dirac
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv]
        refine integrable_congr_ae ?_ c013.integrable
        filter_upwards
        intro x
        by_cases hx : x ∈ S
        · simp
        · simp [c012 x hx]
    exact c014

exact integrable_dirac _
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv]
        exact (c015.mono_set (by simp)).withDensity (measurable_semicirclePDF μ v)

push_neg at hx
              cases' hx with h1 h2
              · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - μ), Real.sqrt_nonneg ↑v, Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ ↑v from by positivity)]
              · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - μ), Real.sqrt_nonneg ↑v, Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ ↑v from by positivity)]
            exact Real.sqrt_eq_zero_of_nonpos this
    exact c018

have h_cont : ContinuousOn (fun x => Real.exp (t * x)) S := continuous_exp.comp_continuous_on (continuous_const.mul continuous_id).continuousOn
        have h_compact : IsCompact S := isCompact_Icc
        exact (h_cont.integrableOn_of_isCompact h_compact).of_norm_bounded h_bound
    by_cases hv : v = 0
    · simp_all [semicircleReal_zero_var, integrable_dirac]
    · rw [integral_semicircleReal_eq_integral_smul hv]
      refine integrable_of_integrable_mul_left' ?_
      have h_meas : Measurable (semicirclePDFReal μ v) := measurable_semicirclePDFReal μ v
      have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ᵐ[volume] semicirclePDFReal μ v := ae_of_all _ (semicirclePDFReal_nonneg μ v)
      exact (integrableOn_congr_set_ae (ae_of_all _) (integrableOn_of_isCompact_closedBall _ _)).2 c014

gcongr
            have : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
              rcases hxS with ⟨h1, h2⟩
              calc
                |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by ring
                _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := abs_add _ _
                _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √↑v := by
                  gcongr
                  exact abs_sub_le_iff.mpr ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
            exact this
      · exact (isCompact_Icc).finite_measure
    exact integrable_of_integrableOn_compl_eq_zero c013 (by
      intro x hx
      simp [c012 x hx])
